summary: Applied two surgical seam-polish edits: diversified the chapter opening construction while preserving content, and aligned the final beat with Chapter 7's entry state.
edits: Reframed the opening paragraph to start with Ina's immediate action instead of a time-led scaffold, while retaining the same noon/studio/overnight-reroute information.
Adjusted the final sentence so Ina leaves with the burner while the monitored phone stays lit on her kitchen table, matching the Chapter 7 handoff.
